T0.sql:
SELECT COALESCE(p.column_name, u.column_name) AS column_name,
                   p.ordinal_position, u.ordinal_position, p.data_type, u.data_type
            FROM (SELECT * FROM PROD_DB.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
                  WHERE table_schema = 'BI' AND table_name = 'LEARNING_ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT') p
            FULL JOIN (SELECT * FROM UAT_DB.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
                  WHERE table_schema = 'BI' AND table_name = 'LEARNING_ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT') u
              ON p.column_name = u.column_name
            WHERE p.column_name IS NULL OR u.column_name IS NULL
               OR p.ordinal_position != u.ordinal_position
               OR p.data_type != u.data_type
            ORDER BY COALESCE(p.ordinal_position, u.ordinal_position)

T1.sql:
SELECT p.n, u.n, p.n - u.n
            FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM PROD_DB.BI.LEARNING_ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region) p,
                 (SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM UAT_DB.BI.LEARNING_ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region) u

T3.cte:
WITH prod AS (SELECT t."Acknowledgement ID" AS "Acknowledgement ID",
       t."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID",
       t."COURSE_ID" AS "COURSE_ID",
       t."ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ID" AS "ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ID",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Title", '') AS "Acknowledgement Title",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Text", '') AS "Acknowledgement Text",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Introduction", '') AS "Acknowledgement Introduction",
       t."Acknowledgement Created Date" AS "Acknowledgement Created Date",
       t."Acknowledgement Modified Date" AS "Acknowledgement Modified Date",
       t."Acknowledgement Checked Date" AS "Acknowledgement Checked Date",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_NAME", '') AS "CLIENT_NAME",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_REGION", '') AS "CLIENT_REGION"
       FROM PROD_DB.BI.LEARNING_ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region),
     uat AS (SELECT t."Acknowledgement ID" AS "Acknowledgement ID",
       t."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID",
       t."COURSE_ID" AS "COURSE_ID",
       t."ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ID" AS "ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ID",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Title", '') AS "Acknowledgement Title",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Text", '') AS "Acknowledgement Text",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Introduction", '') AS "Acknowledgement Introduction",
       t."Acknowledgement Created Date" AS "Acknowledgement Created Date",
       t."Acknowledgement Modified Date" AS "Acknowledgement Modified Date",
       t."Acknowledgement Checked Date" AS "Acknowledgement Checked Date",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_NAME", '') AS "CLIENT_NAME",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_REGION", '') AS "CLIENT_REGION"
       FROM UAT_DB.BI.LEARNING_ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region)
T3.sql:
WITH prod AS (SELECT t."Acknowledgement ID" AS "Acknowledgement ID",
       t."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID",
       t."COURSE_ID" AS "COURSE_ID",
       t."ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ID" AS "ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ID",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Title", '') AS "Acknowledgement Title",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Text", '') AS "Acknowledgement Text",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Introduction", '') AS "Acknowledgement Introduction",
       t."Acknowledgement Created Date" AS "Acknowledgement Created Date",
       t."Acknowledgement Modified Date" AS "Acknowledgement Modified Date",
       t."Acknowledgement Checked Date" AS "Acknowledgement Checked Date",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_NAME", '') AS "CLIENT_NAME",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_REGION", '') AS "CLIENT_REGION"
       FROM PROD_DB.BI.LEARNING_ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region),
     uat AS (SELECT t."Acknowledgement ID" AS "Acknowledgement ID",
       t."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID",
       t."COURSE_ID" AS "COURSE_ID",
       t."ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ID" AS "ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ID",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Title", '') AS "Acknowledgement Title",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Text", '') AS "Acknowledgement Text",
       NULLIF(t."Acknowledgement Introduction", '') AS "Acknowledgement Introduction",
       t."Acknowledgement Created Date" AS "Acknowledgement Created Date",
       t."Acknowledgement Modified Date" AS "Acknowledgement Modified Date",
       t."Acknowledgement Checked Date" AS "Acknowledgement Checked Date",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_NAME", '') AS "CLIENT_NAME",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_REGION", '') AS "CLIENT_REGION"
       FROM UAT_DB.BI.LEARNING_ENROLMENT_ACTIVITY_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region)
SELECT 'in_prod_not_uat' AS direction, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM prod EXCEPT SELECT * FROM uat)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'in_uat_not_prod', COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM uat EXCEPT SELECT * FROM prod)

Pedal Group encourages the use of AI in our business, within guardrails to protect sensitive data. This policy sets out how to use AI effectively while protecting sensitive company and customer data. You are responsible for protecting sensitive company information, following data protection laws, and company policies. Actions of AI are done with your approval, in your name. The purpose of this policy is to establish clear guidelines for the safe, ethical, and secure use of AI tools by all Pedal Group employees, contractors, and partners. This policy should be read in conjunction with the Pedal Group Cyber Security Policy - when using AI tools or any other software, you are bound by cyber security policies.

I agree to comply with Flex@TIO policy (as updated from time to time) in accordance with the terms and conditions of my employment.

This policy enables and promotes a culture of flexible working. We are committed to equality, diversity, and inclusion and flexible work practices. The Telecommunications Industry Ombudsman's (TIO) purpose is to provide fair, independent and accessible dispute resolution services and improve outcomes for consumers and members. One of our key goals to achieve our purpose is to leverage the power of our people to strengthen capability and performance. This policy enables our purpose and goals by building adaptable services and shaping a flexible work culture. We welcome the diversity of our workplace participants and recognize the skills, talents, passions, cultures, ethnicities, religions, beliefs, national origins, identities, gender, sex, sexuality, intersex variation, ability, age, life experience and choices and perspectives our workplace participants contribute. TIO is committed to equality, diversity, and inclusion. The TIO is also committed to providing a safe, respectful, and professional workplace in which all are treated with dignity, courtesy, and respect. If you would like to learn more about Flexible Work Arrangements, you can find the Flexible Work Arrangements elearning module available in your PEARL course catalogue or via this link (right click to open in a new window)
